content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the car positioned near center, and the road is clearly visible bending left — the car appears on course following the curve.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 53, target = (53 + 5) % 121 = 58
- Target WP58: (4.1604, 3.2857)
- Car: x=4.7869, y=2.7501, heading=158.225°
- dy = 3.2857 - 2.7501 = 0.5356
- dx = 4.1604 - 4.7869 = -0.6265
- bearing = atan2(0.5356, -0.6265) = 180° - atan2(0.5356, 0.6265) = 180° - 40.49° = 139.51°
- delta = 139.51° - 158.225° = -18.715° → moderate right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead but WP58 is still to the right of current heading (delta=-18.7°), applying moderate right steering at speed 1.5 to stay on the waypoint line through the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track heads west around WP46-52, then curves left (southwest) toward WP55+",
    "Car is consistently ~0.05-0.09m left of center on westward section — stable position",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta around -18 to -22° on this westward-to-southwest section requires steering_angle=-15",
    "After WP58-62, track curves sharply left heading south — prepare to steer left",
    "Heading wraps near ±180° when traveling west — normalize delta carefully",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "WP57+ marks increasing left curve heading southwest, left steering needed soon",
    "Car has been consistently right-correcting on westward section — pattern is stable",
    "Watch for delta sign flip when track turns left past WP62-65"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.054, 4.966, 4.871, 4.787],
    "y": [2.612, 2.647, 2.696, 2.750],
    "yaw": [174.23, 169.40, 163.87, 158.23]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP58 at (4.160, 3.286): dy=0.536, dx=-0.627, bearing=139.51°, delta=-18.72° → moderate right, steer -15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
